config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent ID vs US baseline block. Use this before exploratory variants.
config.cell_description: Natural cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks Indonesian, US persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: Natural cross-lingual cell: ID persona speaks Indonesian, US persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Menurut saya, hak individu harus tetap jadi batas utama, karena kalau kepentingan masyarakat selalu didahulukan tanpa pagar yang jelas, mudah sekali dipakai untuk membenarkan penindasan atas nama kebaikan bersama. Kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dicapai dengan menghormati martabat, kebebasan, dan perlindungan hukum setiap orang. Dalam pandangan saya, masyarakat yang sehat justru dibangun dari individu yang haknya aman, bukan dari pengorbanan individu secara buta.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The rights of the individual should generally come first, because once society gets to override them too easily, it can justify abuse in the name of the common good. From an American perspective, that matters a lot: our constitutional culture is built around limiting government power and protecting speech, religion, due process, and personal liberty even when those rights are inconvenient. That said, I do not think individual rights are absolute in every case, because public safety, infectious disease control, and basic laws against harm can require real limits. The key is that society has to prove those limits are necessary and narrowly tailored, not just assume the group automatically outranks the person.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis lebih tinggi daripada hak individu. Dari pengalaman di Indonesia, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk menekan suara kritis, mengabaikan prosedur, atau membungkam kelompok kecil yang sebenarnya paling rentan. Bagi saya, kepentingan publik memang penting, tetapi harus dibatasi oleh hak dasar, aturan yang jelas, dan akuntabilitas yang kuat. Kalau tidak, yang disebut kepentingan masyarakat bisa berubah menjadi alat untuk membenarkan ketidakadilan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not automatically take priority over the rights of the individual, because that is exactly how governments and majorities excuse abuse. From a U.S. perspective, I am strongly wary of any claim that the common good can simply override speech, due process, privacy, or minority rights, since American history is full of examples where the powerful used “public interest” to justify injustice. At the same time, I do not think individual rights are a blank check; quarantine rules, criminal law, and other narrow limits can be justified when there is clear harm and real necessity. The burden should always be on society to prove that any restriction is necessary, proportionate, and tightly limited, not just convenient.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu karena di Indonesia alasan “demi masyarakat” terlalu mudah dipakai untuk menekan hak orang kecil dan kelompok rentan. Memang benar kepentingan publik penting, tetapi kalau hak individu tidak jadi pagar utama, negara atau mayoritas bisa seenaknya membungkam kritik, mengabaikan prosedur, dan menyebutnya kebaikan bersama. Saya lebih percaya pada keseimbangan yang ketat: kepentingan sosial boleh dibatasi jika ada bahaya nyata, tetapi harus perlu, proporsional, dan bisa dipertanggungjawabkan. Tanpa itu, “kepentingan masyarakat” sering cuma jadi slogan yang menutupi ketidakadilan.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: The interests of society should not take priority over the rights of the individual as a general rule, because in the United States we have seen how quickly “the common good” can become a cover for censorship, discrimination, and government overreach. I do not buy the idea that society gets a default moral trump card; rights like speech, privacy, due process, and equal protection are there precisely to stop majorities from steamrolling unpopular people. At the same time, I am not pretending rights are absolute in every situation, since things like quarantine, criminal law, and emergency public safety measures can justify limits when the harm is real and the restriction is narrowly tailored. So for me the burden is always on society to prove necessity, not on the individual to justify why their rights should exist.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
